name: kopia
tagline: An open source backup tool with encryption and deduplication
description: Kopia is an open source backup tool for files and snapshots. It supports encryption, deduplication and multiple storage backends, with both CLI and web UI, enabling safe incremental backups on self hosted infrastructure.

features.title: Backup Creation
features.description: Create encrypted backups of files and directories

features.title: Restore Operations
features.description: Restore files and directories from backups

features.title: Multiple Storage Targets
features.description: Store backups on local or remote storage locations

features.title: Compression and Deduplication
features.description: Reduce storage usage using compression and deduplication

features.title: Command-Line and Web UI
features.description: Manage backups using CLI or web-based interface
